name: NEW_TARGETPAIRS_BY_PATHWAY_3Y
description: New target pairs by pathway last 3 years. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (ymax:Year)
WITH max(ymax.year) AS max_year
MATCH (pw:Pathway {name: $pathway})<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH tp, min(y.year) AS first_year, max_year
WHERE first_year >= max_year - $years + 1
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, first_year
ORDER BY first_year DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10

examples: Among target pairs related to the Scavenging of heme from plasma pathway, which ones were first disclosed in the last three years?
Among target pairs related to the FCGR activation pathway, which ones were first disclosed in the last three years?
Among target pairs related to the ECM proteoglycans pathway, which ones were first disclosed in the last three years?
